characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main character. A 70 something year old woman who speaks her mind. She can be quite rude but loves her family more than anything. Amazingly Embarrassing Parents: Agnes' antics are the constant bane of Cathy's life, particularly when it comes to meeting Cathy's boyfriends. Catchphrase: "Do you want a cup of tea?","That's nice."and "How do doo do?" when she answers the phone. Deadpan Snarker: Much of the humor comes from her snarky remarks, often due to the stupidity of other people. Fainting: Whenever she receives a huge shock. It usually has to do with Rory and Dino's antics.

characters.name: The Brown Family
characters.description: The main character. A 70 something year old woman who speaks her mind. She can be quite rude but loves her family more than anything. characters.name: Other Characters
characters.description: Agnes' best friend who hasn't really got a clue what is going on. The Ditz: So much so that she's diagnosed as demented after she butts in on a mental health test actually intended for Grandad. Drives Like Crazy: As shown in the episode "Motor Mammy", everyone who lets her drive them ends up with PTSD, and usually has to remember toBring Their Brown Pants. Happily Married: She always gushes about her husband Jacko and often reminisces about her sexual experiences with him out loud (the latter is much to the disgust of her tablemates). Running Gag: Her belief that Sharon is a virgin.
